scope: The client_search public parse request from ParseApiRequest through QueryRouter and endpoint formatting to ParseApiResponse. Downstream customer-search execution is outside this graph.

nodes.responsibility: Represent the exact public business parse request accepted by the endpoint.

outputs.description: The public ParseApiRequest containing the user's query and request identity.

nodes.responsibility: Extract the query and trace identity before delegating parsing to QueryRouter.

outputs.description: The user query passed from the public endpoint to QueryRouter.
outputs.observation_gap: The public request shows the intended query, but current tracing does not independently snapshot the value at the router call boundary.

outputs.description: The correlation identity retained for router execution and response tracing.

nodes.responsibility: Orchestrate deterministic parsing, fallback selection, validation and the result returned to the endpoint.

outputs.description: The query value received by QueryRouter before normalization.
outputs.observation_gap: No current Tool snapshots the QueryRouter entry value independently from the endpoint request.

nodes.responsibility: Normalize punctuation, spacing and field vocabulary before every parsing branch.

outputs.description: The normalized business query consumed by deterministic matching and L4 fallback.
outputs.observation_gap: The existing replay exposes this value only for the L2 replay boundary, not for every deployed route.

nodes.responsibility: Extract deterministic Level 1 business conditions from the normalized query.

outputs.description: Conditions produced by the Level 1 deterministic engine before L2 override.
outputs.observation_gap: No current verifier Tool or business trace exposes the per-case L1 output.

nodes.responsibility: Expand configured Level 2 patterns, full-match the query and select the actual rule and matched text.

outputs.description: The selected Level 2 rule identity for this query.
The expanded regular-expression pattern that full-matched the normalized query.
The exact normalized text consumed by the selected Level 2 match.

nodes.responsibility: Extract configured capture groups from the selected Level 2 pattern match.

outputs.description: The named or positional substrings extracted from the actual Level 2 match.

nodes.responsibility: Build confirmed business conditions from the selected Level 2 configuration and captured values.

outputs.description: Confirmed Level 2 field/operator/value conditions returned by the real matcher.

nodes.responsibility: Apply the router's L2-over-L1 replacement rule and select deterministic conditions or the L4 fallback branch.

outputs.description: The deterministic conditions immediately after the L2-over-L1 replacement rule.
outputs.observation_gap: No current stage probe observes the L1 input, L2 input and merged output together for a case.

nodes.responsibility: Build the retrieval-augmented prompt and determine whether intent context is available for Level 4 parsing.

outputs.description: The exact prompt content submitted to the Level 4 model, including retrieved field definitions and examples.
outputs.observation_gap: The public response may contain prompt-like debug text, but it does not prove the exact deployed prompt, system message, model configuration and request identity.

outputs.description: Whether retrieved business intents were available when the Level 4 prompt was built.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

nodes.responsibility: Invoke the configured Level 4 model and retain its unparsed response and finish reason.

outputs.description: The raw model response before JSON extraction or condition conversion.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

outputs.description: The model finish reason associated with the raw Level 4 response.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

nodes.responsibility: Extract JSON from the raw model response and convert returned condition objects into business Condition values.

outputs.description: Conditions after Level4LLMParser JSON extraction and conversion, before router merge and validation.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

outputs.description: The query logic parsed from the Level 4 model result.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

nodes.responsibility: After L4 conversion, recall merge-eligible Level 2 candidates and combine them with the model conditions according to runtime strategy.

outputs.description: Level 2 candidate conditions recalled again with merge_to_llm_only enabled for the L4 branch.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

outputs.description: The L4 branch conditions immediately after optional Level 2 candidate merge.
outputs.observation_gap: The required L4 replay is not implemented.

nodes.responsibility: Apply explicit full-name enforcement and materialize retained name candidates before common condition validation.

outputs.description: The selected deterministic or L4 conditions after name-specific transformations and immediately before _validate_conditions.
outputs.observation_gap: No current Tool records the selected branch immediately before common validation.

nodes.responsibility: Validate condition fields and values, normalize conditions for summary and attach route metadata.

outputs.description: Conditions remaining after router field/value validation.
outputs.observation_gap: Field configuration is inspectable, but the pre/post validation case snapshots are unavailable outside the unimplemented L4 replay.

outputs.description: Validated conditions after normalization for intent-summary construction.
outputs.observation_gap: The required stage-level replay is not implemented.

outputs.description: The parsing level selected by QueryRouter for the returned result.
The route-specific match and diagnostic metadata returned by QueryRouter.
outputs.observation_gap: Diagnostic fields are route-dependent and must not be assumed to contain identical semantics across L2 and L4.

outputs.description: The rewritten query returned by QueryRouter for endpoint serialization.

nodes.responsibility: Normalize date values, build intent summary, remove unsupported conditions and convert age conditions to birthday conditions.

outputs.description: The endpoint debug field: the retained RAG prompt for L4, otherwise the first matched pattern string.
outputs.observation_gap: For L4 this exposes prompt content but not the model/system/runtime identity required for a faithful generation claim.

outputs.description: Conditions after endpoint date-format normalization.
outputs.observation_gap: No current Tool records the condition list immediately after date normalization.

outputs.description: Human-readable intent summary built from the normalized condition set.
outputs.observation_gap: The public API exposes the final summary, not the precise condition snapshot supplied to its builder.

outputs.description: Conditions remaining after the endpoint removes unsupported public fields and operators.
outputs.observation_gap: No current Tool records the condition list immediately before and after supported-condition filtering.

outputs.description: Final public condition list after age-to-birthday conversion.
outputs.observation_gap: The final value is observable, but the immediately preceding condition snapshot is not.

nodes.responsibility: Serialize the final conditions, route metadata and intent summary as the public ParseApiResponse.

outputs.description: The Judge-visible public parse response; downstream customer-search results are not included.

edges.condition: no confirmed deterministic conditions and L4 fallback enabled
JSON extraction and condition conversion succeeded
L4 branch reaches post-conversion candidate recall
matched_level is 4 and endpoint builds its debug field
